title: plesioneuron hopeanum
side_effects: Plesioneuron hopeanum can have side effects if used improperly, such as inducing respiratory problems, skin irritation, and allergic reactions in some individuals. In severe cases, excessive consumption can lead to stomach ulcers, nausea, and vomiting. Improper use of the plant may also cause cardiovascular issues, including rapid heartbeat and blood pressure fluctuations. If not used under the guidance of a medical professional, the plant can exacerbate pre-existing conditions, such as diabetes and hypertension.
